nasb.text: “Tell us, when will these things be, and what will be the sign when all these things are going to be fulfilled?”

esv.text: “Tell us, when will these things be, and what will be the sign when all these things are about to be accomplished?”

cnv.text: “請告訴我們，甚麼時候會有這些事呢？這一切事將要成就的時候有甚麼預兆呢？”

ccb.text: “请告诉我们，这些事什么时候会发生？有什么预兆？”

csbs.text: “请告诉我们，这些事什么时候会发生呢？这一切将要成就的时候，会有什么预兆呢？”
